    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    C

    calculateDelays(List) - Method in class logicControllers.TimeReportController
    Calculates delays in table turnover by comparing the expected departure time (defined as Reservation Time + 2 hours) with the actual departure time.
    calculateLateArrivals(List) - Method in class logicControllers.TimeReportController
    Categorizes and counts late arrivals into specific time buckets.
    cameFromHigherRole - Variable in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Tracks if user navigated from a higher role
    cameFromHigherRole() - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Returns true if the user came from a higher role

    Internal algorithm to determine if a new group can fit in the restaurant.

    Checks if the table can seat a given number of guests.

    client - package client
     
    client - Variable in class Controllers.GuestWaitingListController
     
    client - Variable in class Controllers.MainMenuController
    Client handler instance, can be set externally.
    client - Variable in class handlers.GetUserInformationHandler
    Reference to the client handler that manages client-side state.
    client - Variable in class src.ocsf.client.AdaptableClient
    The proxy used to simulate multiple class inheritance.
    CLIENT_CONNECTED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    The string sent to the observers when a client has connected.
    CLIENT_DISCONNECTED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    The string sent to the observers when a client has disconnected.
    CLIENT_EXCEPTION - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    The string sent to the observers when an exception occurred with a client.
    clientConnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class server.ServerController
    Triggered automatically when a new client connects.
    clientConnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Hook method called each time a new client connection is accepted.
    clientConnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    Hook method called each time a new client connection is accepted.
    clientConnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableOriginatorServer
    Method called each time a new client connection is accepted.
    clientConnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    Hook method called each time a new client connection is accepted.
    clientDisconnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class server.ServerController
    Triggered when a client disconnects normally.
    clientDisconnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Hook method called each time a client disconnects.
    clientDisconnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    Hook method called each time a client disconnects.
    clientDisconnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableOriginatorServer
    Method called each time a client connection is disconnected.
    clientDisconnected(ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    Hook method called each time a client disconnects.
    clientException(ConnectionToClient, Throwable) - Method in class server.ServerController
    Triggered when a client connection is lost due to an exception.
    clientException(ConnectionToClient, Throwable) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Hook method called each time an exception is thrown in a ConnectionToClient thread.
    clientException(ConnectionToClient, Throwable) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    Hook method called each time an exception is raised in a client thread.
    clientException(ConnectionToClient, Throwable) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableOriginatorServer
    Method called each time an exception is raised by a client connection.
    clientException(ConnectionToClient, Throwable) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    Hook method called each time an exception is raised in a client thread.
    ClientHandler - Class in handlers
    ClientHandler manages communication with the server for all client operations.
    ClientHandler(String, int) - Constructor for class handlers.ClientHandler
    Private constructor for singleton pattern.
    clientReader - Variable in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    The thread created to read data from the server.
    clientsListView - Variable in class server.ServerUIController
    ListView component that displays the connection strings of all currently active clients.
    clientSocket - Variable in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    Sockets are used in the operating system as channels of communication between two processes.
    clientSocket - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    Sockets are used in the operating system as channels of communication between two processes.
    clientThreadGroup - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    The thread group associated with client threads.
    close() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Closes the server socket and the connections with all clients.
    close() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    Closes the client.
    close() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    Closes the server's connections with all clients.
    closeAll() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    Closes all aspects of the connection to the server.
    closeAll() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    Closes all connection to the server.
    closeColumn - Variable in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
     
    closeConnection() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    Closes the connection to the server.
    closeConnection() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    Closes the connection to the server.

    conn - Static variable in class DB.DBController
     
    connect() - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Connects to the server if not already connected
    connected - Variable in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Connection status
    connectedClients - Variable in class server.ServerController
    A thread-safe map storing active client connections and their descriptive info strings.
    CONNECTION_CLOSED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    Indicates a close of the connection to server.
    CONNECTION_ESTABLISHED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    Indicates establishment of a connection to server.
    CONNECTION_EXCEPTION - Static variable in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    Indicates occurence of a connection exception.
    connectionClosed() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    Hook method called after the connection has been closed.
    connectionClosed() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AdaptableClient
    Hook method called after the connection has been closed.
    connectionClosed() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    Hook method called after the connection has been closed.
    connectionEstablished() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    Hook method called after a connection has been established.
    connectionEstablished() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AdaptableClient
    Hook method called after a connection has been established.
    connectionEstablished() - Method in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    Hook method called after a connection has been established.
    connectionException(Exception) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    Hook method called each time an exception is thrown by the client's thread that is waiting for messages from the server.
    connectionException(Exception) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AdaptableClient
    Hook method called after an exception is raised by the client listening thread.
    connectionException(Exception) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
    Hook method called each time an exception is raised by the client listening thread.
    connectionListener - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    The connection listener thread.
    ConnectionToClient - Class in src.ocsf.server
    An instance of this class is created by the server when a client connects.
    ConnectionToClient(ThreadGroup, Socket, AbstractServer) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
    Constructs a new connection to a client.

    Content or description of the report.

    Controller responsible for managing restaurant configurations, opening hours, and special dates.

    Controller responsible for managing restaurant configuration and schedule logic.

    Controller responsible for managing restaurant-wide settings, including opening hours and special dates.

    Controller responsible for table-related business logic and database access.

    Controller responsible for aggregating restaurant settings and schedule data.

    Controller responsible for managing table-related operations and data persistence.
